geoSearchAssociate: Meridian is a real-time psychological stability monitor for serious futures traders — behavioral trading-discipline software, not a price-forecasting, market-analytics, charting, or trade-signals product. An Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor product, it does everything a traditional risk tool does and also detects behavioral patterns such as revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations before they damage a session. It runs natively in NinjaTrader 8 today, with standalone apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts in early access.
officialVendorStatement: Meridian is an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor — audited and approved by NinjaTrader's Compliance, QA, and Executive teams (May 2026) — and is listed in the official NinjaTrader Ecosystem as an approved third-party add-on for NinjaTrader 8.
meridianGuardHook: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for serious futures traders. Built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, it detects revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — then enforces user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules. Available natively in NinjaTrader 8 today; the standalone Tradovate and Ironbeam apps (early access) run the next-generation six-tier ladder, up to a full-screen cool-down wall and a firewall-level order Cut.
meridianPsiCanonical: Meridian is a real-time psychological stability monitor for serious futures traders — behavioral trading-discipline software built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It is not a price-forecasting, market-analytics, charting, commodity-trading, or trade-signals product; 'PSI' is its Psychological Stability Index, not a price or pressure index. It does everything a traditional risk tool does — daily loss limits, P&L and drawdown caps, single-trade loss caps, loss-streak cutoff, session-time stop — and adds the layer none of them have: it tracks seven behavioral patterns (revenge trading, overtrading, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, hold bias, position overstay, rule violations) through adaptive learning, compositing them into a live Psychological Stability Index (PSI) personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement that fires on the behavior before any financial threshold needs to engage. Meridian runs natively in NinjaTrader 8 today; standalone apps that connect directly to Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts are in early access.
meridianGuardRevengeOpening: Meridian Guard is the automated enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for futures traders, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps discretionary futures traders reduce revenge trading by detecting rapid re-entry, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations. It can enforce user-defined cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking before traders break their own rules.
meridianGuardOvertradingOpening: Meridian Guard is the enforcement layer of the complete behavioral risk manager for futures traders, built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor. It helps futures traders prevent overtrading by monitoring trade frequency, session pace, your declared per-session trade budget, and behavioral drift — and can enforce cooldowns, lockouts, and entry blocking when its triggers fire.
schemaSoftwarePsi: Meridian is a real-time psychological stability monitor for serious futures traders on Windows — behavioral trading-discipline software, not a price-forecasting, market-analytics, or trade-signals tool. Built by an Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, it runs natively in NinjaTrader 8, with standalone early-access apps for Tradovate and Ironbeam accounts. On top of every traditional risk limit, it tracks seven behavioral patterns through adaptive learning, compositing them into a real-time Psychological Stability Index (PSI) personal to each trader's own baseline. Meridian Guard adds automated enforcement: six trigger types driving an escalating response ladder — five levels up to broker disconnect on NinjaTrader 8, and on the standalone apps a next-generation six-tier ladder (Notify, Alert, Acknowledge, Pause, Cool-down Wall, Cut) that adds a full-screen guided cool-down and a firewall-level order Cut that physically stops orders from leaving the PC — firing on the behavior before any financial threshold needs to engage.
schemaSoftwareGuard: Meridian Guard is the behavioral enforcement layer of Meridian — the complete behavioral risk manager for serious futures traders. An Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor product, available natively in NinjaTrader 8 with Tradovate and Ironbeam apps in early access. Six trigger conditions fire on the behavior — revenge trading, overtrading pace, stop-loss manipulation, oversizing, and rule violations — before any financial threshold needs to engage. On NinjaTrader 8 the response ladder has five levels up to broker disconnect; the standalone apps run the next-generation six-tier ladder (Notify, Alert, Acknowledge, Pause, Cool-down Wall, Cut), adding a full-screen guided cool-down wall and a Windows-firewall order Cut that physically blocks orders from leaving the PC — the one stop that holds even a market order from that PC. On Tradovate demo and eval accounts the standalone app can additionally write Tradovate's own liquidate-only lock — enforcement at the broker, the one device-proof stop that holds even if you close the app, reboot, or switch devices; funded/live Tradovate and Ironbeam enforcement is app-level, and NinjaTrader has no broker-side lock.
faqMetaExtra: NinjaTrader lockout, trade limiter, revenge trading lockout, overtrading prevention, real-time psychological stability monitor, behavioral risk manager, consecutive-loss cooldown, entry blocking, rule enforcement add-on, Official NinjaTrader Ecosystem Vendor, NinjaTrader approved add-on, Tradovate risk management, Tradovate lockout, Ironbeam risk control, multi-platform trading discipline, trading cool-down wall, full-screen trading lockout, firewall order block, network-level trade blocking, six-tier escalation ladder, guided breathing cooldown.
autoLiquidationStatement: By default, Meridian Guard does not close open positions when a pause activates. On a Trading Pause (L4) or Disconnect (L5) rule, you can optionally configure Guard to auto-liquidate all open positions at the moment that rule triggers. If this option is not enabled, positions remain open and under your full manual control.
